  • Open

    Jack in the Box Introduces New Matcha Iced Latte and Oreo Matcha Shake
    Jack in the Box dives into the matcha trend among younger customers with the launch of the new Matcha Iced Latte and new Oreo Matcha Shake. Jack in the Box's Matcha Iced Latte (pictured) features matcha (Japanese green tea) swirled with sweetened cream and vanilla, served over ice. The Oreo Matcha Shake is a vanilla shake mixed with matcha and Oreo cookie crumbles, crowned with whipped topping. Prices vary by location, but a regular Oreo Matcha Shake costs $5.29 ($5.79 for a large) near me here in Los Angeles, while the Matcha Iced Latte starts at $3.49 for a small ($3.99 for a large). Both drinks also happen to be green, which fits the timing with St. Patrick's Day coming up. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!

    Crumbl Bakes New Yellow Sheet Cake
    Crumbl introduces its take on a classic dessert with the debut of the new Yellow Sheet Cake. The dessert joins this week's rotating menu, which runs from February 23 through February 28, 2026. Here's what you'll find on the limited-time lineup: - New Yellow Sheet Cake (pictured) - Golden vanilla cake topped with fudge frosting and chocolate sprinkles. - Mallow Sandwich Cookie featuring Oreo - A chilled creamy center mixed with brownie pieces sandwiched between two chocolate cookies made with Oreo cookie pieces. - Pink Velvet Cake Cookie - A warm pink cake batter cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and pink velvet cookie crumbs. - Lemon Glaze Cookie - A warm lemon cookie topped with lemon glaze and a fresh lemon slice. In addition to the weekly menu, Crumbl will also be serving up S'mores Cookie Thins for its "Thins Thurdays." Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Cracker Barrel has unveiled its 2026 spring menu, featuring a range of new and returning dishes, including two new scrambles, the return of carrot cake, and more. Here's what Cracker Barrel's spring lineup looks like: - New Farmhouse Scramble - Bacon, sugar-cured ham, roasted red peppers, roasted onions, and Colby cheese, served over three scrambled eggs or egg whites, and drizzled with a sweet and spicy maple syrup. Two classic breakfast sides and buttermilk biscuits are also included. - New Garden Scramble - Roasted cremini mushrooms, fresh spinach, red peppers, onions, and pepperjack cheese, served on three scrambled eggs or egg whites, topped with diced tomatoes and green onions.   • Open

    Jack in the Box Puts Together $4.99 Munch Better Deal Meal
    Jack in the Box welcomes a discounted meal deal close to the $5 sweet spot with the introduction of the new $4.99 Munch Better Deal Meal. For the price, you get a choice of either a Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger, a Jr. Chicken Sandwich, a Double Jr. Jumbo Jack (for an extra $1.50), or a Really Big Chicken Sandwich (also for an extra $1.50), plus small fries and a drink. In case you're wondering what you get with each burger/sandwich, here are the details: Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger - A grilled small beef patty, American cheese, tomato, lettuce, pickle, onions, ketchup, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Jr. Chicken Sandwich - A crispy-fried chicken patty, lettuce, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Double Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger - Two grilled small beef patties, two slices of American cheese, tomatoes, lettuce, pickles, onions, ketchup, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Really Big Chicken Sandwich - Two crispy-fried chicken patties, two slices of Swiss cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. The name is an interesting choice as it's the same name that Jack in the Box used for a previous meal deal promotion late last year. That offer included the Gremlins Midnight Meal, the $7 Brunchie Meal, and the $10 Lunchie Meal. As an alternative, the fast-food chain also offers the $6 Jack Pack (price may vary) that includes a Jr. Jumbo Jack Cheeseburger, a Jr. Chicken Sandwich, a taco, small seasoned curly fries, and a small drink. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

  • Open

    Wendy's Debuts New Thin Mints Frosty Fusion and Brings Back Thin Mints Frosty
    The Thin Mints Frosty is back on the menu at Wendy's and is now called the "Thin Mints Frosty Swirl." Joining it is the new Thin Mints Frosty Fusion. The Thin Mints Frosty Swirl (you can find my review of it here) features a Vanilla Frosty swirled and topped with a minty cookie crumble sauce inspired by Girl Scouts Thin Mints cookies. The new Thin Mints Frosty Fusion (pictured) features a Vanilla Frosty mixed with a minty cookie crumble sauce and crushed Girl Scout Thin Mints cookies. Both desserts can also be made with a Chocolate Frosty instead of Vanilla and are available now for a limited time. Prices vary, but at a Wendy's here in Los Angeles, the Thin Mints Frosty Swirl ranges from $2.99 to $3.99, while the Thin Mints Frosty Fusion ranges from $4.19 to $5.49. Additionally, Girl Scouts will be selling cookies at participating Wendy's restaurants nationwide during National Girl Scout Cookie Weekend from February 20-22, and throughout the Girl Scout Cookie season.  Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Maple Bourbon BBQ Whopper Returns to Burger King
    The Maple Bourbon BBQ Whopper is back for a limited time at Burger King. The Whopper variant was introduced in 2024 and features a quarter-pound flame-grilled beef patty, a maple bourbon BBQ sauce, crispy-fried onions, crispy-fried jalapenos, maple candied bacon, and American cheese, served on a toasted sesame seed bun. A Whopper Jr. version is also available. Prices vary, but the Maple Bourbon BBQ Whopper costs $7.99 near me in Los Angeles, while the Maple Bourbon BBQ Whopper Jr. costs $4.79. There's also a Maple BBQ Solo Moment meal and Family-Style BBQ Bundle as digital-exclusive specials when ordering through the Burger King website or mobile app. The Maple BBQ Solo Moment includes a Maple Bourbon BBQ Whopper, small French fries (or onion rings or Have-sies), a Cinnamon Apple Pie, and a small soda for $12 (may vary), while the Family-Style BBQ Bundles costs $27 and includes two Cheeseburgers, two Maple Bourbon BBQ Whoppers, four Cheesy Bacon Tots, two small orders of French fries, and two Cinnamon Apple Pie. Photo via Burger King. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Jack in the Box Brings Back Hot Mess Cheeseburger
    Jack in the Box brings back the Hot Mess Cheeseburger for a limited time through April 5, 2026. The Hot Mess Cheeseburger features a grilled beef patty, white cheese sauce, shredded pepper jack cheese, pickled jalapenos, and crispy-fried onion rings, served on toasted sourdough bread. A double version with two beef patties is also available. You can find my 2013 review of the Hot Mess Cheeseburger here. There's also a Hot Mess Munchie Meal (pictured) that includes the burger plus two tacos, seasoned curly fries, a drink, and a limited-edition Meat Riot antenna ball (the Hot Mess was introduced back in 2013 with advertising featuring an '80s rock band by the name of Meat Riot). The Hot Mess Cheeseburger starts at $5.99 (it's $6.99 here in Los Angeles), while the Hot Mess Munchie Meal starts at $13 ($14 near me). Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Shamrock Shake and Oreo Shamrock McFlurry Return to McDonald's
    Ahead of St. Patrick's Day 2026, the Shamrock Shake and Oreo Shamrock McFlurry have returned to the McDonald's menu for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. The Shamrock Shake features vanilla soft serve blended with minty (and green) Shamrock syrup, topped with whipped cream. The Oreo Shamrock McFlurry, on the other hand, features vanilla soft serve mixed with Shamrock syrup and Oreo cookie pieces. Prices vary, but a location here in Los Angeles charges $4.39 for a medium Shamrock Shake and $4.59 for a regular-size Oreo Shamrock McFlurry. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Popeyes Adds New Flavored Shrimp and Brings Back Flounder Fish Sandwich
    Popeyes introduces new flavored Butterfly Shrimp and brings back its Flounder Fish Sandwich for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season. While Popeyes' crispy-fried Butterfly Shrimp can be ordered in its original "Classic" flavor or in several flavors, including Garlic Parm, Lemon Pepper, Ghost Pepper, and Buffalo. They can be ordered as part of the Shrimp Tackle Box and Surf & Turf meal. The Shrimp Tackle Box includes eight Butterfly Shrimp in your choice of flavor served with a regular side, a biscuit, and your choice of dipping sauce. The Surf & Turf meal includes four Butterfly Shrimp and two Chicken Tenders served with a regular side, a biscuit, and your choice of dipping sauce. Prices vary, but both the Shrimp Tackle Box and Surft & Turf meal start at $6.99 at a local Popeyes here in Los Angeles. The Flounder Fish Sandwich features a crispy-fried Alaska flounder filet served with barrel-cured pickles and either Classic Tartar sauce or Spicy Spread on a toasted brioche bun. It costs $6.99 near me. Photo via Popeyes. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    24 Foods People Keep Buying Even While Complaining About Them
    We love to rant about certain groceries, yet somehow they always end up in the cart. Price hikes, portion shrinkage, and uneven quality make great small talk in the aisle, but convenience wins every time. This list digs into the foods we grumble about and still grab on autopilot. You will probably recognize a few […]  ( 10 min )
    23 Foods People Only Eat When They’re Feeling Nostalgic and Stubborn
    Some foods taste like memories you can actually chew. They are the dishes you pull out on rough days, when you crave warmth, reassurance, and a little rebellious comfort. You know they are simple, sometimes dated, maybe even a little over-the-top, but that is exactly the point. Let’s revisit the flavors that keep showing up […]  ( 10 min )
    21 Lunchbox Foods That Got Replaced by “Healthier” Versions Nobody Loves
    Remember when lunch felt like a tiny party in a brown bag? Somewhere along the way, our favorite classics got swapped for better-for-you versions that no one begged for. You want balance, sure, but not snacks that taste like homework. Let’s revisit the legends that got “upgraded” into joyless replacements and why the originals still […]  ( 11 min )
    20 Retro Foods That Would Shock a Modern Grocery Shopper
    Step into a fluorescent-lit time capsule where dinner came from cans, boxes, and the freezer aisle. These throwback bites once ruled potlucks, TV trays, and weeknight shortcuts, and many would turn heads in a modern grocery cart. You will recognize some with a smile and others with a shiver of curiosity. Ready to revisit the […]  ( 11 min )
    20 Meals People Used to Make to Stretch a Paycheck
    When money gets tight, the kitchen becomes a place for clever swaps, simple flavors, and comforting classics. These are the meals that saw families through lean weeks without sacrificing warmth or satisfaction. You will find hearty bowls, toasty sandwiches, and pantry heroes that still taste like home. Let this list spark ideas that save cash […]  ( 11 min )
    21 Meals That People Think Are Easy Until They Try Doing Them Right
    Some dishes look simple until you try to nail every little detail. That is when technique, timing, and patience separate average from unforgettable. If you have ever wondered why your version does not taste like your favorite spot, this list explains where things go sideways. Ready to turn deceptively simple meals into bragworthy wins you […]  ( 11 min )
    21 Foods That Only Feel “Gross” Because You’ve Never Had the Good Version
    Some foods earn an unfair reputation simply because most people meet them in their worst form. When you finally try a version made with care, the flavors snap into focus and everything clicks. Think crisp, fresh, thoughtfully seasoned, and sourced from people who love the ingredient. If you have been side eyeing these, the right […]  ( 11 min )

  • Open

    New Banquet Mega Breakfast Bowls Arrive
    Conagra Brands, Inc. launches new Banquet Mega Breakfast Bowls, featuring 30g of protein per bowl. The new frozen breakfast bowls are rolling out to stores this month and come in four varieties: - Meat Lovers (pictured) - Scrambled eggs, sausage, roasted potatoes, ham, bacon, cheddar cheese sauce, and cheddar cheese. - Bacon - Scrambled eggs, roasted potatoes, bacon, cheddar cheese sauce, and shredded cheese. - Sausage - Scrambled eggs, sausage, roasted potatoes, cheddar cheese sauce, and shredded cheese. - Sausage & Gravy - Scrambled eggs, sausage, roasted potatoes, country gravy, and shredded cheese. To preserve the various textures of the eggs, potatoes, and protein, the bowls feature a tray-in-tray steaming setup that keeps the sauce and ingredients separate during heating. Another Conagra brand, Healthy Choice, uses a similar setup for its Simply Steamers line. Banquet Mega Breakfast Bowls range from 9 to 10.5 ounces. Prices vary, but Walmart sells them for $4 each. Photo via Banquet. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Captain D's Debuts New Crispy Crunchy Shrimp
    Captain D's introduces new, limited-time Crispy Crunchy Shrimp for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season through April 5, 2026. The new menu item features the chain's butterfly shrimp, coated in flaky, crushed wonton wrappers and served with Sweet & Sour Sauce. The chain is featuring a $5.99 Full Meal Deal that includes four Crispy Crunchy Shrimp, one piece of Batter Dipped Fish, Sweet & Sour Sauce, hush puppies, and a choice of classic side. Captain D's rounds out its Lent offerings with Fried Oysters, Seafood Gumbo, and new Chocolate Cake. Photo via Captain D's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Church's Offers $5 Big Deal Box
    The Big Deal Box arrives at Church's Texas Chicken as the fast-food fried chicken chain's latest meal deal. Starting at $5, the Big Deal Box includes a choice of a leg and thigh or three tenders served with two regular classic sides, a Honey-Butter Biscuit, and a jalapeno pepper. A seafood version that swaps in eight Classic Shrimp and cocktail sauce in lieu of chicken is also available and starts at $6.49. If you can't decide between the two, there's also the Surf & Turf Big Deal Box, which includes a leg and thigh or two tenders, four Classic Shrimp, two regular classic sides, a Honey-Butter Biscuit, and a jalapeno pepper. Additionally, Church's continues to offer the Texas 2PC Feast and has brought back its Blueberry Cheesecake Fried Pie for a limited time. The Texas 2PC Feast starts at $3.49 and includes a leg and thigh or two tenders with dipping sauce, accompanied by a Honey-Butter Biscuit and a jalapeno pepper. Church's Blueberry Cheesecake Fried Pie is a turnover-style pie featuring a crispy, flaky crust and a combination of cheesecake filling and blueberry filling side by side. Prices may vary, but the pie costs $1.99 here in Los Angeles. Photo via Church's Texas Chicken. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Crumbl Bakes New Biscoff Skillet Cookie
    Crumbl welcomes the new Biscoff Skillet Cookie to headline this week's limited-time selection of baked desserts. The full rotation available from February 16 through February 21, 2026, is as follows: - Biscoff Skillet Cookie - A warm,  lightly-spiced Biscoff cookie topped with a scoop of mousse, crumbled Biscoff pieces, and a drizzle of melty Biscoff cookie butter. - Raspberry Cheesecake - Vanilla cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust, topped with a tangy raspberry spread and a whipped cream rosette. - S'mores Cookie - A graham cracker cookie packed with milk chocolate chips, topped with a melty marshmallow, chocolate drizzle, and buttery graham cracker crumbs. - Buckeye Brownie Cookie - A warm chocolate brownie cookie topped with peanut butter and melted semi-sweet chocolate. Crumbl also offers a permanent Classic menu that includes: - Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie filled with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. - Pink Sugar Cookie - An almond sugar cookie topped with a pink almond frosting. - Chocolate Crumb Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm chocolate cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and more Oreo cookie pieces.  - Brownie Batter Cookie - A warm chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips and topped with brownie batter. - Snickerdoodle Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie rolled in a cinnamon-sugar coating. - Celebration Cake Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting and rainbow sprinkles. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Ben & Jerry's Launches Three New Sundae Flavors
    Ben & Jerry's launches three new flavors of its grocery store line of Sundaes, which feature pints of ice cream topped with whipped topping and more. The new Sundae flavors are rolling out to retailers now and include: - Straw-Bae Shortcake (pictured) - Sweet cream ice cream with shortcake cookies and strawberry swirls, topped with strawberry-swirled whipped topping and shortcake crumble. - PB Blondie Bestie - Peanut butter ice cream with blonde brownies and graham cracker swirls, topped with caramel-swirled whipped topping & mini peanut butter cups. - Mocha Mood Pie - Chocolate cold brew ice cream with chocolate cookies and chocolate cookie swirls, topped with fudge-swirled whipped topping and fudge chips. Ben & Jerry's Sundaes launched in 2025 with a lineup that includes Dulce De-lish!, Choco-lotta Cheesecake, Turtle, and the Cookie Vermont-ster flavors. Sundae pints can be found at grocery retailers for a suggested price of $4.99 to $6.49. Photo via Ben & Jerry's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
